name: Explosive Tackle
outcome: [AttackerName] suddenly leaps forward, and slams directly into [TargetName]'s gut with [AttackerHisOrHer] rather impressive weight, sending them both sprawling to the ground, and leaving [TargetName] dazed for a moment while [AttackerName] wraps [AttackerHisOrHer] incredibly warm and luscious tits around [TargetHisOrHer] cock!
miss: [AttackerName] tries to leap forward and Tackle [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to dodge the sudden lunge!
